properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We stand as youths, we stand for Christ, We give our all, we dedicate our lives, We fight the fight, we keep the faith, We are the salt of the earth, we run the race.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We dedicate our lives to Jesus, We pledge that we will stand, We promise to live our lives by all that He commands We'll fulfill the words of the prophet, our hearts are being returned to Jesus Christ.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In this Dark Age, we shine as lights on that seventh peak, eagles high in flight, We're soaring towards the heavens above We’ll lay down our lives, as Jesus did in love.
